title: carex athrostachya var. unilateralis
intro: Carex athrostachya var. unilateralis is a type of sedge, a perennial plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues and fever. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing congestion and relieving coughs. In herbal preparations, Carex athrostachya var. unilateralis is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be consumed to alleviate respiratory symptoms.
